description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure depicted in a casual urban outfit. He wears a short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted pants, paired with low-top sneakers. The figure has medium-length hair that is parted and slightly wavy, framing the face and extending to the neck. The arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, with hands open and fingers naturally spaced. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a neutral, upright stance. The clothing and shoes are simple, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure with a t-shirt, fitted pants, sneakers, and medium-length wavy hair, standing upright with arms relaxed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, chest, and front of the t-shirt, pants, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, t-shirt, pants, and the heels of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted pants
